creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173434
svn(1) diff of net/freerdp

Attaching svn(1) diff supporting the following changes:

* Take MAINTAINER
* Remove stray whitespace from pkg-plist (as reported by portlint(1))
* Change USE_OPENSSL => USES= SSL, went ahead and verified functionality when linked against security/libressl
* X11 option to include xorg=xrender
